channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.title: NBA election: Female lawyer in early lead
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Mrs. Oyinkansola Badejo-Okusanya leads the NBA election, poised to become the first female president. Follow the latest results and historic moment.
Read More: https://punchng.com/nba-election-female-lawyer-in-early-lead/

item.title: Alert MFB assets hit N50bn amid rising credit demand
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Alert Microfinance Bank’s assets soar to N50bn, demonstrating growth despite Nigeria’s tough economy and rising credit demand.
Read More: https://punchng.com/alert-mfb-assets-hit-n50bn-amid-rising-credit-demand/

item.title: Embrace savings, shun Ponzi schemes, NDIC urges youths
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
The NDIC encourages Nigerian youth to embrace legitimate wealth creation through savings and avoid Ponzi schemes, promoting financial literacy and inclusio
Read More: https://punchng.com/embrace-savings-shun-ponzi-schemes-ndic-urges-youths/

item.title: 61% of Nigerians demand interest rate cut ahead MPC
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
61% of Nigerians want the CBN to reduce interest rates, according to a new report. Businesses are particularly keen on an interest rate cut to ease borrowi
Read More: https://punchng.com/61-of-nigerians-demand-interest-rate-cut-ahead-mpc/

item.title: Nigeria, Liberia deepen trade ties under AfCFTA agenda
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria and Liberia are strengthening trade ties and attracting investment under the AfCFTA agenda. Discover how this partnership will boost economic growt
Read More: https://punchng.com/nigeria-liberia-deepen-trade-ties-under-afcfta-agenda/

item.title: Petrol imports jump 207% as domestic supply weakens
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Nigeria’s petrol imports surged by 207% in June 2026, while domestic supply fell. Discover the impact of increased petrol imports on the Nigerian market.
Read More: https://punchng.com/petrol-imports-jump-207-as-domestic-supply-weakens/

item.title: Christian bodies reject planned ban on bus preaching
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Christian organisations in Nigeria oppose the FRSC Bill’s proposed ban on bus preaching, citing constitutional rights infringement and economic concerns.
Read More: https://punchng.com/christian-bodies-reject-planned-ban-on-bus-preaching/

item.title: 49,498 Nigerian workers got UK work visas in five years — Report
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A new report reveals 49,498 Nigerian workers received UK work visas between 2021 and 2026, with health and care sectors dominating. Learn about the trends
Read More: https://punchng.com/49498-nigerian-workers-got-uk-work-visas-in-five-years-report/

item.title: Atiku to N’Assembly: Name officials behind N210bn budget duplication
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
Atiku Abubakar urges National Assembly to investigate N210bn budget duplication in the 2026 Appropriation Act, citing fiscal indiscipline under Tinubu’s ad
Read More: https://punchng.com/atiku-to-nassembly-name-officials-behind-n210bn-budget-duplication/

item.title: Benumbing greed and collusion
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:
A Federal High Court has ordered the forfeiture of 48 properties linked to former AGF Abubakar Malami. Discover the details of this significant ruling.
Read More: https://punchng.com/benumbing-greed-and-collusion/

item.title: Golden Boot race: Mbappe pulls two clear of Messi
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Kylian Mbappe now leads the way in the Golden Boot race with 10 goals - two clear of Lionel Messi who plays in Sunday's World Cup final.

item.title: England claim third at World Cup with win in 10-goal thriller over France
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: England nearly blew a four-goal lead against France as Bukayo Saka’s hat-trick gave the Three Lions a remarkable 6-4 bronze medal win in Miami to achieve their best World Cup finish since 1966.

item.title: Koulamallah: Africa’s lone voice, by Patrick Omorodion
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: During the week I saw a letter from the Nigeria Football Federation, NFF to FIFA Secretary General registering Nigeria’s support for the re-election of Gianni infantino as FIFA president posted by my colleague, Charles Anazodo. I then remembered the actions of Infantino at the ongoing World Cu

item.title: Nigeria needs to invest more in cultural storytelling – Muyiwa Ademola
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Nollywood icon and one of the leading figures in Yoruba cinema, Muyiwa Ademola, popularly known as ‘Mr. Authentic, has spent more than two decades captivating audiences with his unique storytelling. The post Nigeria needs to invest more in cultural storytelling – Muyiwa Ademola appeared first on The

item.title: What the portrait doesn’t say…
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: ART has often taken inspiration from other fields, showing ideas that science can measure but not always show. Babatunde Atolagbe’s recent photos sit at this crossroads, using portrait techniques The post What the portrait doesn’t say… appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: SpaceX (SPCX) Loses Its IPO Premium as a Bigger Supply Test Looms

item.title: The odd quirks of Peter Obi at sixty-five
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Valentine Obienyem The Greek biographer Plutarch, in the preamble to his ”Life of Alexander”, observed: ”I am writing biography, not history; and the most brilliant exploits do not always manifest a man’s virtue or vice so well as a slight thing, a word or a jest, which often tells us more of his

item.title: R24 Media signs Netburn Olaitan as newest music act
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: R24 Media has announced the signing of Nigerian music artist Babatunde Yusuf Alabi, professionally known as Netburn to a management agreement. The post R24 Media signs Netburn Olaitan as newest music act appeared first on The Sun Nigeria.

item.title: How did England players rate during the World Cup?
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: BBC Sport England reporter Alex Howell assess how the Three Lions' players fared in North America.

item.title: Rechael Okonkwo unveils Odogwu Girl in Lagos
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: The crème de la crème of the Nigeria’s entertainment industry gathered to rejoice with award winning Nollywood actress and philanthropist, Rechael Okonkwo, popularly known as Nkoli Nwa Nsukka, when she unveiled her book, ‘Odogwu Girl: From Dreams to Reality’, at a colourful public presentation held

item.title: It’s time to move forward, by Funmi Komolafe
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: Brethren, let’s thank God for a new day.  For us, it should be a time to move forward. Moving forward means moving from the point you are now to a new point.  Indeed a new status. It also means, it is time to make up your mind to shift from stagnation to motion. It could […] The post

item.title: Saka Scores Hat-trick As England Edge Out France In 10-Goal Thriller, Clinch First-Ever World Cup Bronze
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: A hat-trick from Bukayo Saka helped England edge out France 6-4, in a thrilling FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place play-off on Saturday. The win means England clinched their first-ever bronze medal at a FIFA World Cup, having finished fourth in 1990 and 2018. France captain Kylian scored twice which to

item.title: FrankCee excites audiences from Abuja to Britain
item.dc:creator: The Sun
item.description: Franklin Chinonso Diala, better known by his stage name FrankCee, is steadily building a reputation as one of Nigeria’s emerging music talents, captivating audiences with a vibrant fusion of Afrobeat, Afropop and contemporary African sounds. Through determination, creativity and consistency, he has

item.title: Mbappé Becomes World Cup’s All-Time Top Scorer
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: France forward Kylian Mbappé has become the highest goalscorer in the history of the FIFA World Cup after taking his tally to 22 goals. The record-breaking feat saw Mbappé become the leading scorer in the men’s World Cup, surpassing the previous all-time mark. The French captain also extended his le

item.title: Nigeria’s democracy without legislators and judiciary, by Dele Sobowale
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: “Legislators have the first place in the temple of glory; conquerors come behind them” – Voltaire, 1694-1778, VANGUARD BOOK OF QUOTATIONS, VBQ, p 126 When one of the world’s leading philosophers made that remark in the eighteenth century, democracy was a new idea. What another sage, half a wor

item.title: England Defeat France 6-4 In World Cup Bronze Thriller
item.dc:creator: The Whistler
item.description: England secured third place at the 2026 FIFA World Cup after edging France 6-4 in a pulsating ten-goal contest at Miami Stadium on Saturday, avenging their heartbreak from Wednesday’s semi-final defeat to Argentina with a share of the consolation prize. Thomas Tuchel’s side dominated the

item.title: The toy-boy that was the best thing to happen to this cougar!
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Bunmi Sofola Angela was in her mid 30s when she became broody. “I began to wonder if I’d ever settle down, and become a mum”, she said. “To say I’d live life to the full so far would be an understatement. My 20s and the majority of my 30s had consisted of mild partying, travelling […] Th

item.title: Saka Hat-Trick Fires England Past France In 10-Goal World Cup Thriller To Clinch Bronze
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: England claimed the bronze medal at the 2026 FIFA World Cup after surviving a dramatic French comeback to record a pulsating 6-4 victory in an unforgettable third-place play-off, with Bukayo Saka producing a magnificent hat-trick. The Three Lions appeared to have the contest wrapped up by half-time

item.title: Spain vs Argentina: who will win the decisive World Championship battle?
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The key to La Roja’s success at the World Championship 2026 is its impeccable organization. Every player executes the coach’s instructions flawlessly, prioritizing team cohesion over individual brilliance.

item.title: Saka hat-trick helps England down France to win World Cup 2026 Bronze Final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Kylian Mbappe scores twice for France to hit World Cup record, but England win 6-4 in third-place playoff final.

item.title: Kylian Mbappe breaks all-time World Cup scoring record with 22nd goal
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Mbappe is back on track to defend his Golden Boot title, which he and Messi have traded between themselves throughout the tournament.

item.title: Senate: Thank you, but…, by Tonnie Iredia
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: In recent times, new narratives are emerging daily in Nigeria’s fight against insecurity. On a daily basis, we now hear of bandits and kidnappers that are captured by our gallant security forces. New developments, more impetus, greater hopes. Also, recently, the Nigerian senate approved a donation o

item.title: Saka nets hat-trick, Mbappe breaks goal record in 10-goal Bronze match
item.dc:creator: Ripples Nigeria
item.description: Bukayo Saka scored a hat-trick to help the Three Lions of England seal a 6-4 victory over France in the 2026 World Cup Bronze match on Saturday night. France had trailed 4-0 from the first half but a fine second half performance saw the French push for a comeback with Kylian Mbappe scoring a brace.

item.title: Saka nets hat-trick as England beat France in 10-goal thriller to secure World Cup Bronze
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Saka then took centre stage. The Arsenal winger struck twice before the break, first finishing Marcus Rashford's incisive pass in the 37th minute before firing home from the edge of the area in first-half stoppage time to send England into the interval with a commanding 4-0 lead.

item.title: England beat France 6-4 in World Cup third-place playoff
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: England beat France 6-4 in a high-scoring World Cup third-place playoff thanks to a hat-trick from Bukayo Saka while Kylian Mbappe became the highest scorer in the tournament's history. The post England beat France 6-4 in World Cup third-place playoff appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Soludo Unveils Statue of Literary Icon Chinua Achebe in Anambra
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Anambra State Governor, Chukwuma Soludo, has unveiled a statue in honour of renowned novelist and literary icon, the late Chinua Achebe, in his hometown of Ogidi, Idemili North Local Government Area. The monument, located at Ugwunwasike Roundabout, was unveiled on Saturday, 13 years after the celebr

item.title: World Cup 2026: France escape humiliation but fall to England in Deschamps' final match
item.dc:creator: France 24

item.title: BREAKING: England Edge France to Claim World Cup 2026 Bronze Medal
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: England survived a remarkable France comeback to secure a historic FIFA World Cup 2026 third-place playoff victory, defeating Les Bleus 6-4 in a thrilling bronze medal clash in Miami. The Three Lions produced a stunning first-half performance, scoring four goals before the break and appearing set fo

item.title: Moving without arriving: Oluyemi’s rat race series
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Pelumi Oluyemi often turns everyday experiences into metaphors for bigger social issues. She uses familiar places to explore themes like work, ambition, and daily routines. The post Moving without arriving: Oluyemi’s rat race series appeared first on Tribune Online.

item.title: Kebbi commissioner lights up community, declares war on crimes, mosquitoes
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: By Victor Ahiuma-Young BIRNIN KEBBI — In a move aimed at boosting security and promoting public health, the Kebbi State Commissioner for Information and Culture, Yakubu Ahmed, has donated solar-powered street lights and anti-mosquito chemical spray to residents of Rafin Atiku Ta Gabas in Birnin Kebb

item.title: Littler: People can moan about me and Humphries - someone needs to stop us
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Luke Littler is more than ready to defend his World Matchplay title after an opening round 10-6 win over Niko Springer and believes that people should not "moan" about his and Luke Humphries' domination, but rather someone should stop them.

item.title: What Are No Deposit Bonus Codes and How Can You Get Them?
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: Before activating any no deposit bonus, it is important to understand the accompanying terms and conditions. Wagering requirements remain one of the most significant factors, as they determine how much betting must be completed before bonus winnings become eligible for withdrawal.

item.title: Three Bayelsa civil servants face prosecution over alleged N500m theft
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “On June 22, at about 10:30 a.m., the petitioner led a team comprising ministry staff and the Head of Human Resources Management on an inspection,” he said.

item.title: Littler kicks off World Matchplay defence in stunning fashion
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Luke Littler fired in an average of over 109 to kick off his World Matchplay defence in empathic fashion on Saturday.

item.title: Theft Of Govt Property: Delta Police Command Secures Conviction Of 16 Suspects
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Delta State Police Command has secured the conviction of 16 male suspects for offences bordering on theft of government property, conspiracy, malicious damage and unlawful possession of prohibited drugs. The convicted persons are Yaro Abdul (25), Mohammed Isah (31), Hassan Jato (23), Azeez Bello

item.title: World Cup final tickets near $2.3m mark on FIFA’s resale platform
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: While no tickets are available on FIFA's sales platform, they are being resold for sky-high prices on resale sites.

item.title: NBA Election: Badejo-Okusanya extends lead in presidential race
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Of the three candidates, only Mrs Badejo-Okusanya secured additional votes that were substantial enough to increase her share of the total votes cast. The post NBA Election: Badejo-Okusanya extends lead in presidential race appeared first on Premium Times Nigeria.

item.title: Rogers to join Chelsea in record £117m transfer
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: English PRemier League club have thrown £117m to Aston Villa for the signature of Morgan Rogers. The Blues are set to splash a record transfer fee on the Englishman who led Aston Villa to Europa League glory last season. According to report, he will sign a six years deal with the option for an extra

item.title: Jigawa Suspends ₦1.3bn Hospital Renovation Contract Over Substandard Work
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Jigawa State governor, Malam Umar Namadi has ordered the immediate suspension of the ₦1.3 billion renovation and remodelling contract for Gumel General Hospital, citing poor workmanship, substandard quality, and unsatisfactory progress by the contractor. The suspension of the contract followed an un

item.title: NBA Election Not Suspended, Cancelled – President
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The President of the Nigerian Bar Association, Mazi Afam Osigwe, SAN, has said the rumoured cancelation of the election was the handy work of his detractors. According to him, the election has been fair, credible and peaceful. He said at about 5pm Saturday, over 152 lawyers have exercised their fran

item.description: Former Vice President and presidential candidate of the African Democratic Congress (ADC), Atiku Abubakar, has accused the President Bola Tinubu administration of fiscal recklessness following reports of alleged duplicated and overlapping allocations exceeding ₦210 billion in the 2026 federal budget

item.description: Former President Goodluck Jonathan has expressed sadness over the passing of Dame Mary Amaechi, mother of a former Governor of Rivers State, Rotimi Amaechi. The post Jonathan commiserates with Amaechi over mother’s death appeared first on Vanguard News.

item.title: Troops Dismantle Suspected Illegal Bunkering Site, Arrest 6 In Lagos
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Troops of the Nigerian Army’s 65 Battalion have dismantled a suspected illegal bunkering site in the Orile General Area of Lagos State, arresting six suspects and recovering vehicles and petroleum products believed to be linked to the illicit operation. The operation, carried out on July 16, f

item.title: Lagos bunkering site dismantled as army seizes vehicles, petroleum products
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: “The suspects and recovered items were subsequently handed over to the Nigeria Security and Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC) Lagos State Command by the Commanding Officer, 65 Battalion, Lieutenant Colonel S Adeojo, for further investigation and necessary legal action.”

item.title: Police Nab Fake Pastor, Accomplice Over Abduction Of 4-Week-Old Baby In Niger
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: The Niger State Police Command has arrested a suspected fake pastor and his alleged accomplice for the abduction of a four-week-old baby in Minna, the state capital. The Command’s Public Relations Officer, SP Wasiu Abiodun, disclosed this in a statement issued on Saturday, saying the baby has

item.title: Nigerian Rocket Ajayi blasts 9.84s to stun London Diamond League
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The Auburn University product and Nigerian record holder clocked a wind-assisted but legal 9.84 seconds (-0.7 m/s) to edge out Jamaica’s reigning world champion Oblique Seville, who finished second in 9.87 seconds.

item.title: Northants beat Hampshire in thriller to win first Vitality Blast title in a decade
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: ​​​​​​​Northamptonshire claimed their first Vitality Blast title in a decade and third overall with a thrilling 14-run win over Hampshire in Saturday's see-saw Edgbaston final.

item.title: 2 US Troops Killed, 1 Missing After Iranian Missile, Drone Attack In Jordan
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Two United States service members have been killed and another declared missing following an Iranian missile and drone attack on a military installation in Jordan, the US Central Command (CENTCOM) confirmed on Saturday. The incident marks the first American military fatalities attributed to Iranian

item.description: The federal government said it has secured the renewal of a Nigerian international passport for a citizen who had experienced delays.  The Presidential Enabling Business Environment Council disclosed this in a statement on Saturday.  This comes after a Nigerian woman had taken to her

item.description: The Nigerian Army, weekend, said that it's troops of 65 Battalion have successfully dismantled a suspected illegal bunkering site in the Orile area of Lagos State, leading to the arrest of six suspects and the recovery of items linked to the illicit activity. The post Lagos: Troops arrest 6 illegal

item.title: Hydration breaks not popular and Fifa will review - Wenger
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Arsene Wenger says he accepts the hydration breaks introduced at the 2026 World Cup have not been popular and Fifa will review their impact after the tournament.

item.title: Transfer: Eintracht Frankfurt agree personal terms with Onyedika
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Raphael Onyedika is nearing a permanent transfer to Bundesliga club Eintracht Frankfurt after agreeing personal terms, DAILY POST reports. Eintracht Frankfurt are, however, still in talks with Belgian Pro League champions Club Brugge to finalise the deal. The Eagles have made attempts to sign Onyedi

item.title: Iran Threatens ‘Unforgettable Lessons’, As Two US Troops Killed

item.description: Kabiru Dogo has resumed duties as technical adviser of Niger Tornadoes, DAILY POST reports. Dogo was appointed to his new role earlier this month. He had his first training session with the team on Saturday. The experienced tactician guided El-Kanemi Warriors to the 2026 President Federation Cup tri

item.title: Peter Obi At 65: Extolling A Visionary’s Enduring Influence
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Today marks not merely the passage of another year, but a commemoration of the profound and lasting impact of a leader whose political philosophy and personal conduct have fundamentally reshaped the definition of leadership in contemporary Nigeria. As His Excellency, *Peter Onwubuasi Gregory Obi, re

item.title: Two US troops killed and one missing after Iranian attack in Jordan
item.dc:creator: BBC News World
item.description: Iran and the US have traded strikes as hostilities re-escalated this week, with Tehran targeting US military facilities across the Gulf region.

item.title: NPFL: Akin Maxwell appointed Doma United sporting director
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Akin Maxwell has been appointed the new Sporting Director of Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) side Doma United. Maxwell previously served as the Chairman of Osun United. He has also worked with NPFL side Shooting Stars. Maxwell’s track record is expected to help the Savannah Tigers on th

item.title: World Cup: Iniesta advises Spain on how to beat Messi-led Argentina
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: Former Spain international, Andres Iniesta, has advised the La Roja on how to beat Lionel Messi-led Argentina when both sides clash in the World Cup final on Sunday. Iniesta also warned Spain that it would be completely impossible to shut Messi down during the encounter. Speaking to Tribal Football,

item.title: Co-evolution of self-replication and function in a digital primordial soup
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.09211 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48962429 Points: 9 # Comments: 3

item.title: The Open: Sunday's R4 pairings and tee times for Royal Birkdale
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Pairings and tee times for the final round of The 154th Open, held at Royal Birkdale in Southport, Merseyside.

item.title: Ada: An AI business intelligence software from CSV and Excel(yes LLMs but more)
item.dc:creator: Hacker News
item.description: Article URL: https://github.com/saineshnakra/automated-data-analyst Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48962405 Points: 4 # Comments: 2

item.title: Cockroach Party protest intensifies after Wangchuk forcibly hospitalised
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Protest by India's Cockroach Janta Party has intensified after activist Sonam Wangchuk was forcibly hospitalised.

item.title: ‘Not Time To Complain’: Rivers Senator Charges Youths To Embrace Skills Acquisition
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: Banigo also praised President Tinubu and Senate President Godswill Akpabio for backing the initiative, urging the graduates not to let the training end as a line on a certificate but to carry it into the community. The post ‘Not Time To Complain’: Rivers Senator Charges Youths To Embrace

item.title: NBA Election: Electoral Committee Urges For Calm Amid Complaints
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: The Electoral Committee of the Nigerian Bar Association (ECNBA) has acknowledged that heavy traffic on the e-voting platform may result in delayed delivery of the One-Time Password (OTP) required for voters to participate in the ongoing 2026 NBA National Elections. In an advisory released by the cha

item.title: Latin America unites to cheer against Argentina in FIFA World Cup final
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: Fans from Mexico to Brazil unite to cheer Yamal's Spain against Argentina and Messi, whom they call 'FIFA’s golden boy'.

item.title: DLA appoints ex-NNPP chairman, Odeyemi as acting Osun chair
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: Former Osun State Chairman of the New Nigeria Peoples Party (NNPP), Dr. Tosin Odeyemi, has been appointed Acting Chairman of the Democratic Leadership Alliance (DLA) in the state. The appointment, which takes immediate effect, was conveyed in a letter dated July 17, 2026, and signed by the National

item.title: Manchester United lose to Wrexham in first pre-season match
item.dc:creator: Daily Trust
item.description: A strong Manchester United XI was defeated by Wrexham 1-0 in its first match of the pre-season at the Olympic stadium in Helsinki, Finland. The Welsh side playing in the English Championship scored in the winning goal in the first half against their more illustrious English Premier League opponents

item.title: Monarchs, Others Hail Rotary’s Humanitarian Services As Bakare Installed District Gov
item.dc:creator: New Telegraph
item.description: Traditional rulers and other stakeholders have commended Rotary International for its contributions to community development, describing the organisation as a model of selfless service. They made the commendation during the installation of entrepreneur and Chief Executive of Around ‘D’ Clock Securit
